 (strike=red = more dmg on cards)

(0 cost = yellow= more yellow meter generated)

Its pretty easy
Caro isn’t an early game trait you want to go for
They scale off hp loss, and you need their skills levelled substantially before it will start working
Check the talent
The higher DR lily has, the more shield.she creates
The higher DR Alva has, she deals more dmg on her Keen Blade
but that means they want to upkeep DR, not trigger it
No point to trigger DR cause no one wants to, and no point to create another Faint
Create another with same Mechanic only makes the other turn trash
The thing I was saying, that faint is the only one that wants to play around a mechanic of triggering DR, and i think that's interesting and I wish they had more characters like that.
And Sorel E3,
If you want trigger
If DR trigger embryo fusion increase 25%
That's also my point in later part of my statement
Create more of the same mechanics only turn the older one becomes garbage
So-called "meta change"
Even now Faint isn't be used in Caro team because she does nothing
No slot for her because people feel.like it's a waste to even put her in team
Not really, that depends on how they design the characters. They can design characters that work off of each other rather then making others obsolete
The whole point is. No one wanna trigger DR

Often times there are characters that aren't deemed too good, but later on they become good with the release of new items and characters that synergize with them better. 

And my whole point is that, it would be interesting if there was a character that wants to trigger DR like faint 😭
It's just awkward playing around DR trigger
That's why Faint was ignored in Caro team
Or any team
If there were characters with the same mechanics
Later part your HP is around 1k3 to 1k5
To trigger DR means you have to waste all those HP
Facing boss you actually wanna bring someone useful then someone who can restore DR because your DR is useless against bosses
Unless certain stages require you to trigger your DR, no one actually wants to bring them in actual fight because it cannot catch up with the dmg

You do know faint can restore DR, and i think you're too focused on how it is currently, vs how it could be in the future. I think we're also having a misunderstanding in what we're saying. I feel you're arguing it's current state, versus me saying I wish they would have more fun interactions with it  😭
I said it above
It cannot catch up with the dmg
So unless someone can restore 500% DR per turn
It's kind of pointless playing around it
Let take Tulu for example
Being as Boss, Tulu can deal around 2k dmg per turn, tentacles whip like 20 times
So then 1 turn kill all your DR if you don't make enough shield to withstand the tentacle whip
And Tulu forbid all your action after 10 counts
You can't play card, can't use key, can't ultimate
I think I'm going to stop this conversation with you, I don't see it going anywhere.
The mechanic won't change
No matter how it will be in the future
Unless trigger DR without being dead can occur
So in the end, to trigger DR, you have to die
No one wanna die, that's my whole point
